item.title: Landing Page Optimization: Best Practices and Tools for Boosting Conversions
item.author: Author
item.description: A landing page is a critical component of any online marketing campaign. It is designed to convert website visitors into leads or customers by encouraging them to take a specific action, such as filling out a form or making a purchase. However, not all landing pages are created equal. In this article, we will discuss best practices for landing page optimization and tools to help boost conversions. What is a good conversion rate for landing pages?

item.title: What does a Google Ads Specialist do?
item.author: Author
item.description: Background After graduation, I entered an Internet company responsible for overseas promotion, and after a year, I switched to be an overseas advertising specialist, and since then, I have started my road of Google advertising. I have pushed new products, been in charge of high net worth products, experienced the whole account being blocked, and recently started to learn to recruit competent subordinates. Although the market situation is not optimistic in these years, from my personal experience, from the perspective of salary and market demand, overseas advertising specialist is still a good career choice.

item.title: Step by Step Guide to Create a Google Ads Campaign
item.author: Author
item.description: For many Google Ads’s beginners, it will be confusing to create a new Google Ads campaign when they hope to start their digital marketing strategy. Here I would like to offer the most detailed step by step guide to create your own first campaign. Before follow the steps bellow, please make sure that you have already own a valid Google Ads account. If you do not have such qualified account, please refer to the official guide and create one.
